$description: Notification component color tokens for inline and toast notifications across all severity levels.

action-hover.$description: Background color for notification action buttons on hover. Use for interactive elements within light-themed notifications.

action-tertiary-inverse.$description: Background color for tertiary action buttons in inverse (dark) notifications. Use for low-emphasis actions in dark notification variants.

action-tertiary-inverse-active.$description: Background color for tertiary action buttons in active/pressed state within inverse notifications. Use when user clicks action in dark notifications.

action-tertiary-inverse-hover.$description: Background color for tertiary action buttons on hover within inverse notifications. Use to provide feedback in dark notification variants.

action-tertiary-inverse-text.$description: Text color for tertiary action buttons in inverse notifications. Ensures readable contrast for action text in dark notification variants.

action-tertiary-inverse-text-on-color-di.$description: Text color for disabled tertiary action buttons in inverse notifications. Use when actions are temporarily unavailable in dark notifications.

background-error.$description: Background color for error notifications. Use to alert users of critical issues, failures, or actions that require immediate attention.

background-info.$description: Background color for informational notifications. Use to provide helpful context, tips, or non-critical updates to users.

background-success.$description: Background color for success notifications. Use to confirm successful actions, completed processes, or positive outcomes.

background-warning.$description: Background color for warning notifications. Use to alert users of potential issues, cautions, or actions that need attention but aren't critical.
